messages.message: Invalid transferFunction in basic DFD block. For a non-sRGB VkFormat with sRGB variants it must not be KHR_DF_TRANSFER_SRGB.
messages.details: DFD block #1 transferFunction is KHR_DF_TRANSFER_SRGB but for VkFormat VK_FORMAT_ETC2_R8G8B8A1_UNORM_BLOCK it must not be KHR_DF_TRANSFER_SRGB.

messages.message: Invalid sample qualifierLinear for non-linear transfer function in the basic DFD block.
messages.details: DFD block #1 sample #2 qualifierLinear is 0 but for KHR_DF_TRANSFER_SRGB and channelId 15 (alpha) it must be 1.
